args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts
- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and configures default router stack
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
- Simple note: Default constructor uses SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] fallback chain

## src/hono-base.ts
- Purpose: Base class implementing all Hono routing API methods and request dispatch logic
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, mergePath, compose, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, Env, FetchEventLike, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next, blankPath, mergePath, getPathNoStrict, COMPOSED_HANDLER, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, blankPath
- Simple note: Stores routes in routes array and delegates match to self.router; uses #dispatch for request handling

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Barrel file exporting PatternRouter
- Names noticed: PatternRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Pattern-based router using compiled regex from path patterns
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams
- Simple note: Converts paths with :param and :param{regex} to regex patterns in add; matches entire route list linearly in match

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Barrel file exporting LinearRouter
- Names noticed: LinearRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Linear matching router supporting star/* wildcards and labeled parameters
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, emptyParams
- Simple note: Stores flat route list; match loops through all routes checking path equality or star/label patterns

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Barrel file exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Exports main RegExpRouter class and prepared variant for edge-deploy

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Builds compiled regex matcher from route definitions using trie internally
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, match, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, findMiddleware, HandlerWithMetadata, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, METHOD_NAME_ALL
- Simple note: add() accumulates routes in memory then buildAllMatchers() compiles to [RegExp, handlerMap, staticMap] matcher

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- Purpose: Defines matcher type and match function for RegExpRouter
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match
- Simple note: match() function compiles matchers lazily on first call and caches them

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- Purpose: Stateless RegExpRouter variant for edge runtimes with pre-built matchers
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Constructor takes pre-built matchers; add() validates path against relocateMap then attaches handler

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node class for building regex from route tree
- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey
- Simple note: insert() walks path tokens creating regex fragments; buildRegExpStr() sorts children and joins with |

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- Purpose: Trie structure handling path segments with capture group mark substitution
- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, PATH_ERROR
- Simple note: insert() replaces {named-groups} with temp marks then restores; buildRegExp() swaps #handlerIndex and @paramIndex to final regex

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Barrel file exporting SmartRouter
- Names noticed: SmartRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Router orchestrator trying multiple routers in sequence and committing to first success
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
- Simple note: Tries each router in routers[] array; commits to first that matches and clears remaining routers

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Barrel file exporting TrieRouter
- Names noticed: TrieRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Trie-based router with method-specific nodes and wildcard support
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet
- Simple note: Each node stores methods as map; search() walks tree with pattern matching and collects all matches

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Trie node with pattern support for labeled params and regex groups
- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, search, #pushHandlerSets
- Simple note: children keyed by literal or pattern regex; search() uses BFS queue across path parts

## src/router/common.case.test.ts
- Purpose: Shared test harness for all router implementations
- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, Match, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, getSuiteHierarchy, emptyParams
- Simple name: runTest() takes newRouter function and executes standard test suite with skip capability

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: PatternRouter tests extending common cases with PatternRouter-specific behaviors
- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, PatternRouter, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash
- Simple note: Skips ambiguous param tests; adds test for trailing slash allowing match

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: LinearRouter tests extending common cases with LinearRouter-specific behaviors
- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, LinearRouter, Multi match, params per a handler, Trailing slash, Skip part
- Simple note: Skips label+star combinations and trailing slash; tests star skipping logic

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: RegExpRouter tests with UnsupportedPathError handling for ambiguous routes
- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, RegExpRouter, Return value type, Ambiguous, Multiple handlers with different label, static and dynamic, Capture Group, Complex capturing group, Including slashes
- Simple note: Skips parent/child ambiguous params and complex regex captures; tests lazy matcher compilation

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: SmartRouter tests delegating to common cases with RegExpRouter + TrieRouter stack
- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter
- Simple note: Uses default SmartRouter config with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] fallback

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
- Purpose: TrieRouter tests using common cases directly
- Names noticed: runTest, TrieRouter
- Simple note: No skips; full test suite passes for TrieRouter

## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
- Purpose: Node class unit tests covering search order, wildcards, regex, duplicates, and sort order
- Names noticed: Node, Root Node, Basic Usage, Name path, Param prefix, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match, Sort Order, Duplicate param name, star, Routing order With named parameters, The same name is used for path params, Node with initial method and handler
- Simple note: Tests BFS search collects all matches sorted by score; handles duplicate params per handler

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
